headline: Air Products to Broadcast Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Earnings Teleconference on July 30, 2026
summary: Air Products (NYSE: APD) will hold a conference call to discuss its fiscal 2026 third quarter financial results on Thursday, July 30, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. ET. The teleconference will be open to the public and the media in listen-only mode by telephone and Internet broadcast.

headline: Hydrogen Stocks Split: The Divergent Paths of Steady Incumbents and High-Growth Pure Plays
summary: The hydrogen investment theme splits into two tracks: steady industrial gas leaders (Linde, Air Products) with stable profits, and high-growth pure plays (Bloom Energy, FuelCell Energy) offering explosive upside but extreme valuation risk.
